testcase.name: test_deep_dive_returns_200_not_500

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200 (graceful degradation), got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_console_iter263.py:246: in test_deep_dive_returns_200_not_500 assert r.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 (graceful degradation), got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 (graceful degradation), got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ask_unknown_chip_returns_400

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 400 for unknown chip, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 400 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_console_iter263.py:267: in test_ask_unknown_chip_returns_400 assert r.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for unknown chip, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for unknown chip, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 400 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_ask_valid_chip_returns_200

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_console_iter263.py:281: in test_ask_valid_chip_returns_200 assert r.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
